# Runes
# https://revenge-of-the-fallen-rotmg.fandom.com/api.php?action=parse&page=Runes&prop=wikitext

This page is for a unique mechanic in RotF, Runes.
{| class="article-table"
!Rune
!Bonuses
!Drawbacks
!Color
|-
|Blissful Ignorance
|Imune to Debuffs 
|Imune to buffs/-10% all stats
|Green
|-
|Biding Time
|<nowiki>+50% def/Imune to armor broken</nowiki>
|Health Regen -30%/Mana Regen -30%
|Green
|-
|Blood Pact
|Health Regen +85%
|Abilities use 20% Health instead of mana
|Green
|-
|Arcane Surge
|Mana Regen +135%
|Health Regen -50%
|Green
|-
|Regeneration of the Brute
|Health Regen +115%
|Mana Regen -60%
|Green
|-
|Bulwark of the Surgeon
|Health +250%
|Speed -30%, Dexterity -50%, Attack -30%, Enemies will always target you if your in their vision
|Green
|-
|Mana Hunger
|Hitting bosses/event restores 1.5% of max mana, killing enemies restores 10% of maximum mana
|Mana Regen -95%, Dexterity -12
|Orange
|-
|Narrow Sighted Magic
|Ability Damage +75%
|Mana Regen -75%
|Orange
|-
|Agressive Agitator
|Attack +75%
|Speed -15%, Dexterity -50%, Fire Rate -10%, Imune to Berserk
|Orange
|-
|Perfectionist
|When at full HP, Bonus damage +35%
|When below full HP, Bonus damage -35%
|Orange
|-
|Adrenaline Rush
|When below 70% HP, fire rate +35%, health regen +25%
|When above 70% HP, fire rate -15%, health regen -25%
|Orange
|-
|Consistent Onslaught
|All shots pierce armor, imune to weak
|Weapon damage averaged, imune to damaging
|Orange
|-
|Solo Thief
|<nowiki>+75% loot boost</nowiki>
|<nowiki>-25% loot boost for each player in an instance(other than you</nowiki>
|Blue
|-
|Rare Obsession 
|200% fame gain
|You can't loot anything
|Blue
|-
|Eye for an Eye
|White Bag drop boost +60%
|You can't loot any other item
|Blue
|-
|Dreadstump's Greed
|Loot Drop Boost +33%
|Cannot boost drop chance by dealing SB damage
|Blue
|-
|Restoration Temptation
|Health regen +8% for each hp pot in stack, Mana regen +8% for each mp pot in stack
|Upon using a health or mana potion, you are stunned for 5 seconds
|Blue
|-
|Pot Head
|Killing bosses/events restores 2 hp/mp potions, drinking a health pot gives +4 att/+4 dex/+10% att/+10% dex for 5 seconds, drinking mana pot gives +6 spd/+15% spd/+15% def for 5 seconds
|Health pot doesn't restore health, mana pot doesn't restore mana, -12%vit/-12%wis
|Blue
|}
